race.description: Rmbl Investments Rising Stars Race Hcp
race.comment: Heat of the Rising Stars Series for apprentices, which means the 3kg claim for Shayleigh Ingelse aboard ELEANOR DUMONT (1) might hold extra weight, so to speak. Been in great form this prep, draws well and is a Heavy track winner. ARIZONA LUCK (11) has been out of the placings in two runs since a break, the latest when fourth, beaten 1.75 lengths, over 1200m at Swan Hill. Should be ready to go now. QUEENSBURY (2) turned in a nice effort last time out at the second run of the campaign and finished just 1.75 lengths from the winner in second over 1400m at Pakenham. Suitably placed so anticipating another big run. DOBKINS (4) ran below expectations last start, finishing fifth at Casterton over 1200m. Suitably placed so anticipating a better run this time. Each-way.
